commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a bundled Gradium realtime transcription provider, registers it in the Gradium plugin manifest, adds unit/live coverage, and updates Gradium Voice Call/media/provider docs plus changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: current Voice Call auto-selects the first configured realtime STT provider when streaming.provider is unset, and this PR makes GRADIUM_API_KEY enough for Gradium STT to be considered configured. I did not run a live call or Gradium live test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: A focused repair can implement the conservative explicit-opt-in path; maintainers should override that only if they intentionally want shared-key auto-selection.

target.title: Add Gradium realtime transcription provider
target.body:
## Summary
- add a Gradium realtime transcription provider and register it through the plugin manifest
- cover provider behavior with focused tests and plugin registration checks
- update Gradium voice/media docs, plugin inventory docs, and changelog

## Testing
- git diff --check upstream/main
- node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/gradium/plugin-registration.contract.test.ts extensions/gradium/realtime-transcription-provider.test.ts
- pnpm tsgo:extensions
- pnpm tsgo:extensions:test
- pnpm lint:extensions
- pnpm lint:extensions:bundled
- pnpm run test:extensions:package-boundary:compile
- pnpm run test:extensions:package-boundary:canary

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Gradium can be selected as a realtime transcription provider and can stream real audio through the Gradium realtime ASR WebSocket path after the provider registration change.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS, Node 22, with a real Gradium API key loaded from local shell config. The secret value was not printed.

Exact steps or command run after the patch: Ran `OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 node scripts/test-live.mjs -- extensions/gradium/gradium.live.test.ts` after commit `86e1dcd80fa163d2124d82d949b0acc66b2d599e`.

Evidence after fix: Copied live terminal output from the real Gradium run:

```text
GRADIUM_API_KEY loaded from ~/.zshrc

RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/pratimbhosale/Desktop/workspace/openclaw

Audio written to /var/folders/y6/ghp5ytg96j14fcm1z0dtrw4m0000gn/T/gradium-live-test.wav

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  2 passed (2)
Start at  15:03:35
Duration  11.12s (transform 1.34s, setup 164ms, import 2.61s, tests 8.28s, environment 0ms)
```

Observed result after fix: The real Gradium TTS call generated audio, wrote `gradium-live-test.wav`, and the real Gradium realtime STT provider completed the streaming transcription flow successfully.

What was not tested: No additional gaps.
target.author: timpratim

commands.reason: author association CONTRIBUTOR and repository permission none are not allowed
